title: Learn Risk-Free
subtitle: Complete the course sincerely, and if you still don't find value, we'll refund 100% of your course fee-no questions asked.

requirements.title: Attend Live Classes
requirements.description: Attend at least 66% of all live sessions with your camera turned ON.

requirements.title: Complete Every Assignment
requirements.description: Submit all mandatory assignments and secure a passing grade in each.

requirements.title: One Reattempt Allowed
requirements.description: If you don't pass an assignment on your first attempt, one additional submission is permitted.

requirements.title: Refund Request Timeline
requirements.description: Email your refund request within 10 days after your batch's final live session.

process: Submit your refund request via email.
Our team reviews your course completion records.
If all eligibility criteria are met, your refund is approved.
The refund is processed within 10 working days.
footer: Designed to reward sincere learners. If you complete the course as required and still don't find value, you're protected by our 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee.
